creator: himanshu@thechauhan.dev
text:
The audio output on speaker and headphone jack works okay. But there is no input from microphone. The hardware works fine on other OS.

/dev/sndstat
-------------
Installed devices:
pcm0: <Realtek ALC256 (Analog)> (play/rec) default
pcm1: <Realtek ALC256 (Left Analog Headphones)> (play)
No devices installed from userspace.
